purpose: Document observable governance behavior and public-safe API evidence without exposing private internals.

public_artifacts.description: Public-facing introduction to GAIA and its evidence boundary.
License for the public evidence package only.
High-level system overview with private internals excluded.
Definition of public, redacted, and private scope.
Public API endpoints available for evidence review.
How to verify the public evidence package.
Redacted agent list showing the swarm surface.

excluded_from_public_release: Weights, scoring logic, and routing algorithms
Any unredacted trace or artifact that reveals the private core

integrity_notes.scope: The manifest covers only files publicly released in this package.
integrity_notes.redaction_rule: If an artifact can reveal the private core, it must be excluded or redacted.
integrity_notes.review_rule: Reviewers should verify that the documents, screenshots, and manifest all describe the same public package.
